be no minimum qualifying marks for Scheduled Caste/
Scheduled Tribe candidates, while prescribing a minimum

Castes/Scheduled Tribes/Backward Classes — 
consistent with the requirements of efficiency of

313
In Re: Recruitment of Visually Impaired in Judicial Services

prescribe any such minimum standard at all. While 
prescribing the lower minimum standard for reserved 
category, the nature of duties attached to the post 
and the interest of the general public should also be 
kept in mind.”
